---
title: "IHerbSpec Members"
---

| Name | Institution |
|---|---|
| Natalie Iwanycki Ahlstrand | Natural History Museum Denmark |
| Matt Austin | Missouri Botanical Garden |
| Anthony Baniaga | University of California, Los Angeles |
| Chris Baraloto | International Center for Tropical Botany, Florida International University |
| Samantha Bazan | ALF Herbarium, CIRAD |
| Billur Bektaş | ETH Zurich |
| Rustin Bielski | University of Montana |
| Giovanna Bishop | University of Montana |
| Khalil Boughalmi | Université de Montpellier |
| Sam Brockington | University of Cambridge |
| Jedediah Brodie | University of Montana |
| Warren Cardinal-McTeague | University of British Columbia |
| Alison Carranza | Yale University |
| Jeannine Cavender-Bares | Harvard University |
| Eduardo Chacón | Universidad Costa Rica |
| Flavia Costa | Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia |
| Thomas L.P. Couvreur | PhD, DR2, Institut de Recherche pour le Développement (IRD) |
| Freddie Draper | University of Liverpool |
| Flávia Durgante | Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia |
| Paul Fine | University of California |
| Riley Fortier | Missouri Botanical Garden |
| Ryan Fuller | Missouri Botanical Garden |
| Olwen Grace | Royal Botanic Gardens, Edinburgh |
| Antonio Guzmán | Harvard University |
| Kimberly Hansen | Field Museum |
| Mariana Hernández-Leal | Harvard University |
| Andrew Hipp | Morton Arboretum |
| Michael Hopkins | Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia |
| Rykkar Jackson | University of British Columbia |
| Kevin Karbstein | University of Florida |
| Jonathan Kennedy | Harvard University |
| Shan Kothari | University of Alberta |
| Geneviève Lajoie | Université de Montréal |
| Aaron Lee | University of Minnesota |
| Étienne Léveillé-Bourret | Université de Montréal |
| Jessica Lira Viana | Aarhus University |
| Dudu Meireles | University of Maine |
| Thomas Murphy | International Center for Tropical Botany, Florida International University |
| Andre Naranjo | Florida International University |
| Barbara Neto-Bradley | University of Cambridge |
| Cornelius Nichodemus | University of Maine |
| Molly Nepokroeff | Denver Botanic Gardens |
| Natalia Quinteros-Casaverde | NASA |
| Rick Ree | Field Museum |
| Alexánder Rodríguez | Museo Nacional de Costa Rica (CR) |
| Fabian Schneider | Aarhus University |
| Ricardo A. Segovia Cortés | Chile Digital Herbaria Project |
| Pam Soltis | University of Florida |
| Doug Soltis | University of Florida |
| Daniel Spalink | University of Wisconsin |
| Claire Teakle | University of Liverpool |
| Hanna Tuomisto | Aarhus University |
| Caroline Vasconcelos | Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia |
| Tom Wells | Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew |
| Dawson White | Harvard University |
| Ya Yang | University of Minnesota |
| Meredith Zettlemoyer | University of Montana |



::: {.text-center}
![](images/IHerbSpec%20Meeting%20MOBOT%20002.jpg){fig-align="center" width="95%"}

*Participants at the 2026 IHerbSpec Meeting at the Missouri Botanical Garden.*
:::
